name: Light Pistol
effect_text: Light and heavy pistols are categorized by the caliber of the bullet they fire. Some operators prefer the low recoil and high mag capacity possible with a low-caliber round.

name: Heavy Pistol
effect_text: A heavier-caliber pistol that trades magazine capacity for more certainty in dropping targets.

name: Taser Pistol
effect_text: Taser pistols cover a family of ranged non-lethal weapons small and light enough to carry concealed. Most rely on electrical shocks to drop a target; they inflict non-lethal damage and cannot make Traumatic Hits.

name: Submachine Gun
effect_text: Submachine guns are popular for their small form factor and convenient burst fire. Burst fire expends three rounds to gain +2 to hit and damage rolls.

name: Shotgun
effect_text: A simple double-barrel shotgun that can be found under the counter of practically every bar and shop. Ranges and damages given are for shot shells; slugs double ranges but apply -1 to hit.

name: Semi-Auto Shotgun
effect_text: A semi-automatic shotgun with higher magazine capacity than a basic model. Ranges and damages given are for shot shells; slugs double ranges but apply -1 to hit.

name: Combat Shotgun
effect_text: A burst-fire capable combat shotgun with finer tolerances and more elaborate machining. Burst fire expends three rounds to gain +2 to hit and damage rolls.

name: Rifle
effect_text: A standard semi-automatic rifle with good range and stopping power from its heavier caliber rounds.

name: Combat Rifle
effect_text: A rifle equipped with a burst-fire selector that trades range for higher ammo capacity. Burst fire expends three rounds to gain +2 to hit and damage rolls.

name: Sniper Rifle
effect_text: Often nothing more than a bolt-action rifle with expensive tuning and optics. If not fired from a stationary rest, its statistics are the same as a normal rifle.

name: Automatic Rifle
effect_text: Barely man-portable firearms designed to hurl vast amounts of lead. Can use suppressive fire if properly braced. Each round of ammunition costs $50.

name: Anti-Materiel Rifle
effect_text: 20mm rounds sufficient to punch through lighter armor plating, concrete walls, and full body conversion cyborgs. Use of a secure firing rest is recommended for best results. If not fired from a stationary rest, its statistics are the same as a normal rifle.

name: Grenade Launcher
effect_text: Can launch specially-designed grenades to the listed range, targeting them as if thrown normally. Stand-alone models are available for vehicle or drone mounting. Grenades cost and function the same as their regular equivalents.

name: Heavy Machine Gun
effect_text: Old tech, but reliable. Without a fixed firing position or vehicle mount, recoil makes them almost uncontrollable. Each round of ammunition costs $100.

name: Rocket Launcher
effect_text: Single-shot disposable launchers. -4 hit penalty against human-sized targets, but inflicts frag grenade damage within 5 meters of impact. Anti-armor warheads do double damage to vehicles but lose the frag bonus.

name: Mortar
effect_text: Can lob indirect fire over buildings and obstacles. Minimum range 20m. Always targets AC 20 at first, but each round at the same target grants +1 hit bonus with a forward spotter. Acts as frag grenade with 10m radius. Armor doesn't lessen harm. Rounds cost $50 each.

name: Drone Cannon
effect_text: Heavy semi-automatic weapons too bulky for human portability. A round of firing costs $100 worth of ammunition.

name: Headshot Pod
effect_text: Guided missiles for mounted deployment. Always targets AC 10, but requires two full consecutive rounds of aiming at a visible target before firing on the third round. Bystanders within 5m take frag grenade damage. Each missile costs $2,000.

name: Main Tank Gun
effect_text: Always targets AC 10. Anyone within 10m of impact takes 1d20 damage if not behind heavy cover. Cannot be mounted on aircraft or anything smaller than a tank. Each round costs $1,000.

name: Mounted Autogun
effect_text: A drone cannon's big brother, for larger platforms. Each round of firing costs $100.

name: Shrieker Gun
effect_text: Sonic cannons used for crowd control and non-lethal suppression. Highly effective against unprotected targets, but military-grade ear protection or cyber-ear dampers render the weapon useless.
